text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 60 

EGWP_INDICATOR 

LABEL: Employer Group Waiver Plan (EGWP) Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan benefit package is an employer group waiver plan (EGWP). 

EGWP plans are not open to general enrollment but rather are offered to beneficiaries through an 
employer group. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N =
